# Durable

You gain the following benefits.

## Defy Death

You have [[advantage]] on [[death_saving_throw|Death Saving Throws]].

## Speedy Recovery

As a [[bonus_action]], you can expend one of your [[hit_point_dice]], roll the die, and regain a number of [[hit_points]] equal to the roll.
